backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing user profiles, customer signup/login, and service request management with role-based access control and blob storage mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting the completed update of sub-service items across 7 service category cards on the Services page with exact replacement lists.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing 1-2 sentence summaries of all frontend source files, describing their purpose, styling, and key functionality.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base CSS file defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens including background, foreground, chart, and sidebar variables.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with full SEO metadata, Open Graph/Twitter cards, JSON-LD LocalBusiness structured data, and preload hints for critical assets for YMW Compliance Services.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React app component that sets up TanStack Router with 17 lazy-loaded routes, a dark navy Layout wrapper with Navigation/Footer/FloatingCTA, and a React Query client.
frontend/src/components/Card.tsx: Simple reusable card component that applies the civic-card style class with optional hover cursor and className override support.
frontend/src/components/ConsultationPopu: A timed modal popup (shown after 5 seconds, once per session) that collects user info and service interest to submit a free consultation request, with success and error states.
frontend/src/components/FloatingCTA.tsx: A fixed floating action button group in the bottom-right corner providing WhatsApp chat and phone call links with hover labels.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site footer with brand info, quick links, support links, and legal/policy navigation organized in a responsive multi-column grid.
frontend/src/components/FreeConsultation: A full-page section with a consultation request form that collects name, phone, service, and city, showing a success state with reference ID after submission.
A simple full-screen loading spinner component used as a fallback during lazy-loaded route or component transitions.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Sticky top navigation bar with desktop and mobile layouts, a services dropdown menu with hover behavior, and conditional auth links based on customer session state.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: A non-dismissible dialog modal that prompts new users to enter their name and email to complete their profile, using a mutation hook to persist the data.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, supporting both anonymous and authenticated (Internet Identity) usage, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useCustomerSession.ts: Provides utilities and a hook for storing, retrieving, and clearing a customer session object in sessionStorage.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements an Internet Identity authentication context and provider using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login/logout functions and identity state to child components.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes React Query hooks for all backend interactions including user profiles, blog posts, contact messages, grievances, consultation requests, and customer/service-request operations.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Google Fonts, configures Tailwind CSS with a dark navy/gold design token theme, and defines reusable component utility classes.
frontend/src/lib/utils.ts: Utility functions for merging Tailwind class names and formatting nanosecond backend timestamps into human-readable date strings.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with React Query and Internet Identity providers wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/About.tsx: About page component displaying company stats, core values, team members, and a free consultation CTA section for YMW Compliance Services.
frontend/src/pages/AdminPanel.tsx: Password-protected admin panel that displays filterable tables of all customers and service requests fetched via React Query hooks. Uses session storage to persist admin authentication state.
frontend/src/pages/Blog.tsx: Blog listing page that fetches and displays blog posts with expand/collapse functionality, loading skeletons, and an empty/error state. Includes a hero section and a free consultation call-to-action.
frontend/src/pages/ConfidentialityPolicy: Static page rendering YMW Compliance Services' confidentiality policy as a series of predefined sections with a hero header and a free consultation section at the bottom.
frontend/src/pages/Contact.tsx: Contact page with company info cards (phone, email, address, hours) and a form that submits messages via a React Query mutation, showing a success state with a reference ID on completion.
frontend/src/pages/CustomerDashboard.tsx: Authenticated customer dashboard allowing logged-in users to submit service requests from a predefined list, view their past requests, and access WhatsApp support or document upload via email. Redirects to login if no session is found.
frontend/src/pages/CustomerLogin.tsx: Renders the customer login page with an email/password form, handles authentication via the `useLoginCustomer` mutation, stores the session using `setCustomerSession`, and redirects to the customer dashboard on success.
frontend/src/pages/CustomerSignup.tsx: Renders the customer registration page with a signup form (name, mobile, email, password, business name), validates inputs, calls the `useSignupCustomer` mutation, and redirects to the login page on success.
frontend/src/pages/Disclaimer.tsx: Displays a static disclaimer page for YMW Compliance Services with eight sections covering general disclaimers, legal advice limitations, liability, and contact information.
frontend/src/pages/Grievance.tsx: Renders a grievance submission page with a categorized form (cleanliness, noise, safety, etc.), submits data via the `useSubmitGrievance` mutation, and shows a reference number upon successful submission.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Renders the main landing page showcasing YMW Compliance Services' featured services, stats, strengths, and a free consultation request form with UTM source tracking.
frontend/src/pages/PrivacyPolicy.tsx: Renders the Privacy Policy page for YMW Compliance Services LLP, displaying eight policy sections (data collection, usage, storage, third-party sharing, user rights, cookies, changes, and contact) along with a hero header and a FreeConsultationSection.
frontend/src/pages/RefundPolicy.tsx: Renders the Refund Policy page for YMW Compliance Services LLP, displaying eight sections covering refund eligibility, non-refundable items, request process, timelines, partial refunds, cancellation policy, and contact info.
frontend/src/pages/Services.tsx: Renders the Services listing page, displaying categorized service cards (Business Registration, Tax & GST, ISO Certification, Compliance, Government License, Government Registration, Labour Department, Startup, etc.) with features lists and a FreeConsultationSection.
frontend/src/pages/Signup.tsx: Handles user authentication via Internet Identity, auto-registering new users on first login and showing a ProfileSetupModal when no profile exists; displays login/logout UI and the authenticated user's profile summary.
frontend/src/pages/SocialMedia.tsx: Renders a Social Media page listing YMW Compliance's profiles on X, Facebook, Instagram, LinkedIn, YouTube, and GitHub as clickable cards with follower counts, descriptions, and external links.
frontend/src/pages/TermsAndConditions.ts: React page displaying YMW Compliance Services LLP's Terms & Conditions with 9 sections (acceptance, use, IP, fees, liability, warranties, governing law, amendments, contact) rendered in a dark navy layout with a hero header and a free consultation section at the bottom.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module providing functions to extract URL parameters from both regular query strings and hash-based routing, persist them in sessionStorage, and clean sensitive params from the URL bar without page reload.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom navy/gold color palettes, Inter/Poppins fonts, oklch-based semantic color tokens, custom box shadows, and plugins for animations, typography, and container queries.
project_state.json: Project state snapshot (version 35) describing the multi-page React site for YMW Compliance Services LLP, including architectural notes, known auth/services bugs, and a full list of implemented features such as customer auth, admin panel, dashboard, and blog.
